label: false-dup
a: Authenticated endpoints are rate-limited at 100 requests per minute per user_id. Exceeding the limit returns 429 with a Retry-After header.
b: Unauthenticated endpoints (login, registration, password reset) are rate-limited at 20 requests per minute per IP address. This prevents credential stuffing on public endpoints where user_id is not available.
reviewer_notes: Different rate-limit policies: A is 100/min per user_id on authenticated endpoints; B is 20/min per IP on unauthenticated endpoints. Different limits, different keys, different endpoint classes.
